Class ColGroup

java.lang.Object
com.webfirmframework.wffweb.tag.core.AbstractTagBase
com.webfirmframework.wffweb.tag.core.AbstractJsObject
com.webfirmframework.wffweb.tag.html.AbstractHtml
com.webfirmframework.wffweb.tag.html.tables.ColGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
TagBase, URIStateSwitch, Serializable, Cloneable
public class ColGroup extends AbstractHtml
Since:
1.0.0

    <T> void
    subscribeTo(boolean updateClient, SharedTagContent<T> sharedTagContent, SharedTagContent.ContentFormatter<T> formatter)
    Subscribes to the given SharedTagContent and listens to its content updates but pushes updates of this tag to client browser page only if there is an active WebSocket connection between server and client browser page and if there is no active WebSocket connection that changes will not be cached for later push.
    <T> void
    subscribeTo(SharedTagContent<T> sharedTagContent)
    Subscribes to the given SharedTagContent and listens to its content updates but pushes updates of this tag to client browser page only if there is an active WebSocket connection between server and client browser page and if there is no active WebSocket connection that changes will not be cached for later push.
    <T> void
    subscribeTo(SharedTagContent<T> sharedTagContent, SharedTagContent.ContentFormatter<T> formatter)
    Subscribes to the given SharedTagContent and listens to its content updates but pushes updates of this tag to client browser page only if there is an active WebSocket connection between server and client browser page and if there is no active WebSocket connection that changes will not be cached for later push.

    toCompressedWffBMBytes(Charset charset)

    gets the html string of the tag including the child tags/values.

    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Consumer<TagEvent> successConsumer)
     
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Consumer<TagEvent> successConsumer, int index)
     
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Consumer<TagEvent> successConsumer, Consumer<TagEvent> failConsumer)
     
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Consumer<TagEvent> successConsumer, Consumer<TagEvent> failConsumer, int index)
     
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Consumer<TagEvent> successConsumer, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> failTagsSupplier)
    Invokes successConsumer if the predicate test returns true otherwise replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by failTagsSupplier if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the successConsumer is null the existing children of this tag will be removed if predicate test returns true.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Consumer<TagEvent> successConsumer, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> failTagsSupplier, int index)
    Invokes successConsumer if the predicate test returns true otherwise replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by failTagsSupplier if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the successConsumer is null the existing children of this tag will be removed if predicate test returns true.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> successTagsSupplier)
    Replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by successTagsSupplier if the predicate test returns true otherwise replaces the children with tags supplied by failTagsSupplier if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the failTagsSupplier is null the existing children of this tag will be removed.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> successTagsSupplier, int index)
    Replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by successTagsSupplier if the predicate test returns true otherwise replaces the children with tags supplied by failTagsSupplier if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the failTagsSupplier is null the existing children of this tag will be removed.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> successTagsSupplier, Consumer<TagEvent> failConsumer)
    Replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by successTagsSupplier if the predicate test returns true otherwise invokes failConsumer if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the failConsumer is null the existing children of this tag will be removed.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> successTagsSupplier, Consumer<TagEvent> failConsumer, int index)
    Replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by successTagsSupplier if the predicate test returns true otherwise invokes failConsumer if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the failConsumer is null the existing children of this tag will be removed.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> successTagsSupplier, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> failTagsSupplier)
    Replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by successTagsSupplier if the predicate test returns true otherwise replaces the children with tags supplied by failTagsSupplier if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the failTagsSupplier is null the existing children of this tag will be removed.
    URIStateSwitch
    whenURI(Predicate<URIEvent> uriEventPredicate, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> successTagsSupplier, Supplier<AbstractHtml[]> failTagsSupplier, int index)
    Replaces the children of this tag with the tags supplied by successTagsSupplier if the predicate test returns true otherwise replaces the children with tags supplied by failTagsSupplier if no further whenURI conditions exist and if the failTagsSupplier is null the existing children of this tag will be removed.
